---
title: Home Work 2
subtitle: 16th April 2026
format: html
---



#### Question 1:

**Q1 — Independent t-test:** Two diets are tested on separate groups. Diet X (n=15): mean weight loss = 4.2kg, s = 1.1kg Diet Y (n=15): mean weight loss = 5.1kg, s = 1.3kg At α = 0.05, is there a significant difference? Assume equal variances.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Question 2:

**Q2 — Welch's vs Independent:** Same data as Q1, but Diet Y has s = 3.8kg instead. Should you use independent t-test or Welch's now? Why? Recompute using Welch's and compare the result.

------------------------------------------------ Happy Learning -----------------------------------------------------

```{=html}
<script src="https://giscus.app/client.js"
        data-repo="ArunKoundinya/AIBasicswithAK"
        data-repo-id="R_kgDOLXPVRw"
        data-category="General"
        data-category-id="DIC_kwDOLXPVR84CdeVx"
        data-mapping="pathname"
        data-strict="0"
        data-reactions-enabled="1"
        data-emit-metadata="0"
        data-input-position="bottom"
        data-theme="purple_dark"
        data-lang="en"
        crossorigin="anonymous"
        async>
</script>
```
